accurate.why: Says it 'replaces' the prior level; the amendment appends new FY2025-29 years, but the net effect (new authorization level) is fairly characterized and not contradicted.

no_hallucinations.why: BOLD program context (HHS/CDC public-health awareness) is accurate.

states_purpose.why: States the bill reauthorizes/extends the Alzheimer's public-health awareness program.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Notes the amendment to Section 398B(e) of the Public Health Service Act.

exceptions_conditions.why: No material exceptions or conditions in this short bill.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: the five-year funding authorization.
